differences.justification: SystemDataV3 was removed from ModelVersion because the current service contract no longer exposes system data on model versions.
SystemDataV3 was removed because the current service contract no longer exposes this model.
Breaking change in beta operation: RoutineRun status changed from String to BinaryData to align with the current Routines preview contract.
Breaking change in beta operation: AttackStrategy enum values were removed to align with the current RedTeams preview contract.
Breaking change in beta operation: evaluator initialization parameter accessors were renamed to initializationParameters to align with the current Evaluations preview contract.
Breaking change in beta operation: ContinuousEvaluationRuleAction no longer exposes evalId in the current Evaluations preview contract.
